case_title: BIRD BUSTER, INC. VS. RASHAD SGHAYER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,445.00 FILED BY BIRD BUSTER, INC. DBA DAVID CHAMPAGNE AS TO DEFENDANT SGHAYER, RASHAD FRED'S LIQUOR STORE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED AUG-23-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SGHAYER, RASHAD FRED'S LIQUOR STORE
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BIRD BUSTER, INC. DBA DAVID CHAMPAGNE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF BIRD BUSTER, INC. NO APPEARANCES RASHAD SGHAYER BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
